name: Overdue Report
short_description: Generate overdue book report for staff follow-up.
description: Staff must be able to run a report of all books that are past due and presently checked out. This feature assists with follow-up, accountability, and communications with borrowers. The report will list overdue items, borrowers, and contact information if available.
user_stories: As a librarian, I want to see a list of all overdue books so I can follow up with patrons.
As an assistant, I want concise overdue reports to manage reminders easily.
acceptance_criteria: Given overdue loans, When the report is run, Then all overdue items and borrower details are listed accurately.
Given no overdue books, When the report is run, Then a clear 'no overdue items' message is shown.
interface_notes: Staff-only report screen; downloadable as CSV.
